description: Crafted from soft, genuine leather, this wallet from wac by wrangler is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. wac has elegantly combined classic techniques and innovative designs so you can carry your monetary essentials with ease in this classic wallet.Dimensions: 12 cm x 9.5 cmHas two main compartmentsSix card slots on either side of the wallet with a flap on the right that has a see through id card holderTwo slip pockets on either sideStitch detailing with metal studs and branding embossed on the inside flapCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
